## How I Tested

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from an up-to-date `main` and synced before opening this PR
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`type(scope): summary`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `php artisan test` passes
- [ ] `./vendor/bin/pint` reports no issues (PSR-12)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` values committed
- [ ] For **auth / real-time** changes: ran the [Pre-merge Checklist](../README.md#pre-merge-checklist) and manual smoke tests
